title: Migrate Python SCHC fragmentation
description: Replace private Python fragmentation/ACK format and unlimited parity windows with the approved RFC profile and shared vectors. Preserve bounded manager behavior and add ACK-on-Error state tests.
acceptance_criteria: Python passes shared vectors, focused tests, Ruff/mypy, full suite, and three independent reviews.
close_reason: Completed in 251e43fb4: replaced legacy Python fragmentation with fixed RFC 8724 LICHEN profile, exact fragment/ACK/control wire codecs, bounded sender/receiver/manager state, retries/aborts, capacity and duplicate handling, RuleIDs 0x78/0x79, and production conformance against complete shared vectors. Validation: focused 203 passed; full Python 2851 passed, 26 skipped; Ruff/format/mypy clean on changed files; Rust fixture and strict generated C syntax passed after vector expansion; git diff --check clean; three final independent reviews found no issues.
